data.name: My wife's cheating on me!
data.detailed_description:
《我老婆在背叛我！》是一款充满激情的视觉小说，讲述了一个生活在香港的已婚夫妇的故事。随着剧情的发展，您将见证欲望与诱惑如何将他们的关系推向极限。

欲望满满的妻子无法抗拒更大、更具诱惑力的享乐，陷入了一场激情、背叛与强烈性遭遇的漩涡。

这款挑逗性的视觉小说将戏剧与情色相结合，深入探索这对夫妇关系中的秘密。

凭借多重激情场景和令人心跳加速的情节转折，《我老婆在背叛我！》邀请玩家探索欲望与忠诚的黑暗面。

特点:

  • 紧张的剧情：深入欲望、诱惑与背叛的迷人故事，背景设定在充满活力的香港。

  • 成人内容：游戏包含详细描绘的性行为，包括群体性行为和跨种族的性爱场景，专为成熟观众设计。

  • 精美细致的艺术：享受高质量的视觉效果，精美的角色设计和细腻的场景细节。

  • 恋物癖探索：包含种族角色扮演场景，作为双方自愿的成人幻想呈现，并无冒犯或歧视的意图。

  • 沉浸式音轨：享受精心挑选的配乐，为每个场景增添氛围并提升体验。

  • 单手模式：为舒适设计，您可以完全沉浸在游戏中……腾出一只手进行其他活动。

免责声明：本游戏仅供成人使用，包含不忠、群体性行为和恋物癖的主题。所有角色年龄均在20岁以上，游戏并不支持或鼓励现实中的歧视或冒犯行为。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: My wife's cheating on me!
data.detailed_description:
My Wife's Cheating on Me! is a steamy visual novel that takes you into the life of a married couple from Seoul. As the story unfolds, you'll witness the desires and temptations that drive their relationship to the edge.

The lustful wife can't resist the allure of bigger, more tempting pleasures, leading to a whirlwind of passion, infidelity, and intense sexual encounters.

This provocative visual novel offers a seductive blend of drama and eroticism, as you delve into the secrets of this couple’s relationship.

With multiple steamy scenes and tantalizing twists, My Wife's Cheating on Me! invites players to explore the darker sides of desire and fidelity.

Features:

  • Intense Storyline: Dive into a captivating tale of lust, temptation, and betrayal, all set in the vibrant backdrop of Seoul.

  • Explicit Adult Content: The game contains graphic depictions of sexual acts, including group sex and interracial scenes, tailored for mature audiences.

  • Beautiful, Detailed Art: Enjoy high-quality visuals with stunning character designs and richly detailed environments.

  • Fetish Exploration: Includes scenes with racial roleplay, presented as a consensual adult fantasy without the intent to offend or discriminate.

  • Immersive Soundtrack: Enjoy a carefully curated soundtrack that sets the mood and enhances every scene.

  • One-Handed Play Mode: Designed for comfort, so you can fully immerse yourself in the experience… with one hand free for other activities.

Disclaimer: This game is intended for adults only and features themes of infidelity, group sex, and fetish play. All characters are over the age of 20, and the game does not condone or promote real-world discrimination or offensive behavior.
